config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

peer_responses:
[WAIT]

(Only one state has been observed so far. I need to see two consecutive states of A then B to respond with [ACT].)

[WAIT]

(The last two states were B then B, not A then B.)

trials.response_content:
[WAIT]

(The last two states were A then B... wait, let me recount. The sequence is: B, B, A. The last two states are A then... nothing yet. I need to see what comes next.)

[WAIT]

(The last two states were B then A, not A then B.)
